## Claim Boundary Check

- [ ] This PR does not claim enforcement that is not implemented.
- [ ] This PR distinguishes implemented facts from planned work.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce private or project-specific data.
- [ ] Schema changes are reflected in examples and documentation.

## Known Limitations

List any limitations or unknowns.
